## Safety checklist

- [ ] I did not bundle or copy third-party mod code.
- [ ] Missing optional mods remain non-fatal.
- [ ] Permanent profile rules remain enforced.
- [ ] `python tools/validate_repo.py` passes.
- [ ] Documentation was updated where needed.
